title: Ad Astra: More Structures
description: Add lots of structures, dungeons and bosses in the Ad Astra planets.
body:
# **Ad Astra: More Structures**

_Ad Astra: More Structures is a focused addon for the Ad Astra mod, enhancing planetary exploration with new dungeons and immersive structures. This mod adds carefully designed content to make every planet in Ad Astra a captivating destination for adventurers seeking challenges and rewards._


 
## Features

### Five Unique Dungeons with Bosses and Loot

Each of Ad Astra’s five planets (Mars, Venus, Mercury, Glacio, and the Moon) gains a bespoke dungeon, tailored to its environment and lore. These dungeons are packed with danger, featuring:

 •  Thematic Design: Each dungeon reflects its planet’s aesthetic.
 
 •  Challenging Bosses.
 
 •  Rewarding Loot: Defeat bosses to earn items and rare resources


 
### Immersive Structures

Discover a variety of structures scattered across each planet, enhancing the exploration experience:

 •  Exploration Rewards: Structures contain a few blocks and items that can be expensive to obtain.
 
 •  Atmospheric Design: Each structure is crafted to feel alive, with details that immerse players in the mysteries of Ad Astra’s universe.


 
### For the future?

   As time goes by, I plan to add new structures that will offer even more challenge and exploration.
I made this mod because Ad Astra is great but lacks a lot of content.

 

 
### Compatibility

   Requires Ad Astra.

   Compatible with most exploration-based mods.

   Optimized for single-player and multiplayer environments.
